title: 2026 South Africa World Cup roster, full list of players
original_text:
South Africa is gearing up for its first FIFA World Cup run since hosting the tournament in 2010, when they step onto the pitch as part of Group A for this year’s event in North America.

Bafana, as the team is affectionately known, participates in a group with host nation Mexico , Czechia, and South Korea.

The team will face its toughest challenge of the group stage in the tournament opener on Thursday, June 11, against Mexico at Mexico City Stadium (Estadio Azteca).

South Africa is captained by goalkeeper Ronwen Williams, who has captained the team since 2021, including an incredible run at the 2023 Africa Cup of Nations.

South Afria has appeared in World Cup tournamens, making their debut in 1998. The team also participated in the 2002 World Cup, before hosting in 2010. They will be looking to advance past the Group Stage for the first time.

Who will be representing Bafana on the world’s biggest stage?

A full look at the South Africa roster for the 2026 FIFA World Cup can be seen below.
